title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Mahindra Lifespace

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Mahindra Lifespace
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
